creator: madpilot@FreeBSD.org
text:
After some input from bapt and a few more suggestions from bsam I have 
created this new much better patch. This is much cleaner and slimmer.

In this patch I'm using a ICONV_LIB variable (suggested by bapt) to 
avoid the bsd.port.pre.mk inclusion ugliness.

Also the libiconv port is marked as IGNORE with latest FreeBSD. 
(suggested by bsam)

I also added a stub UPDATING entry I have still to completely fill in. I 
need to perform some more testing about this.

I really hope we can get an exp-run from this fast, so we can get to 
really fixing the tree.

-- 
Guido Falsi <madpilot@FreeBSD.org>
